text: Park S (2026). MANGO: MANGO: Ontology-Guided Tree Structuring Multi-Case Integration GO Enrichment.. R package version 0.99.0, https://github.com/ERASMUSlab/MANGO, https://erasmuslab.github.io/MANGO.
code: @Manual{,   title = {MANGO: MANGO: Ontology-Guided Tree Structuring and Multi-Case Integration for GO Enrichment.},   author = {Seung Gwa Park},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.99.0, https://github.com/ERASMUSlab/MANGO},   url = {https://erasmuslab.github.io/MANGO}, }

title: MANGO
text: MANGO R package Gene Ontology (GO) Biological Process (BP) enrichment analysis helps reduce redundancy improve interpretability top-ranked results. Instead reporting long lists highly overlapping terms, MANGO restructures enriched terms ontology-guided term trees using GO DAG, enabling compact summaries biological signals. release provides following key features: Ontology-based structuring reduce redundant top terms: MANGO reorganizes enriched BP terms tree-structured groups based GO hierarchy term relationships, helping prevent near-duplicate terms dominating top ranks. Active-tree filtering suppress structural false positives: GO hierarchical, significant-looking terms can appear due dependency rather true signal. MANGO defines filters “active trees” using coverage/consistency criteria (e.g., hit-term count hit ratio) downweight structurally driven results. Single-case multiple-case workflows: MANGO supports single-condition summaries multiple-case designs integrating enrichment outputs across conditions. enables discovery common vs condition-specific biological processes facilitates trend/pattern interpretation across dose, time-course, cohort comparisons. Visualization utilities tree-level interpretation: MANGO provides plotting functions summarize active trees term–gene relationships, including single- multiple-case views interpretation reporting. Install: Install Data Preprocessing & Analysis: Single case & Multiple case Visualization: Single case & Multiple case

what: Run the MANGO analysis pipeline — MANGO_ANALYSIS
title: Run the MANGO analysis pipeline — MANGO_ANALYSIS
text: Orchestrates preprocessing (optional), term listing, comparison, separation. Supports single- multi-condition workflows.

title: Run the MANGO analysis pipeline — MANGO_ANALYSIS
code: MANGO_ANALYSIS(   filepath,   DEG_list_name,   ref_genome,   core = 1,   PASSED_RATIO,   PASSED_NUM,   similarity,   FC = 2,   condition = 1,   dynamic_analyisis = "F",   preprocessing = "F" )

title: Run the MANGO analysis pipeline — MANGO_ANALYSIS
text: filepath Working directory path. DEG_list_name DEG list filename filepath. ref_genome Reference genome code ("mm" "hs"). core Number cores. PASSED_RATIO Passed dependency ratio threshold. PASSED_NUM Passed dependency count threshold. similarity Similarity cutoff (%). FC Fold-change ratio cutoff. condition condition index dynamic analysis. dynamic_analyisis "T" "F" enable multi-range filtering. preprocessing "T" "F" run preprocessing inside function.

title: Run the MANGO analysis pipeline — MANGO_ANALYSIS
text: Writes output files disk. Returns NULL invisibly.

title: Run the MANGO analysis pipeline — MANGO_ANALYSIS
code: stopifnot(is.function(MANGO_ANALYSIS)) if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ MANGO_ANALYSIS(   filepath=".",   DEG_list_name="input_DEG_list.txt",   ref_genome="mm",   core=1,   PASSED_RATIO=15,   PASSED_NUM=4,   similarity=70 ) } # }

what: Compute MANGO tree scores across multiple cases — MANGO_COMPARE
title: Compute MANGO tree scores across multiple cases — MANGO_COMPARE
text: MANGO tree (term dependency string), maps GO descriptions calculates per-condition score using rich factor DEG fold-change information, producing comparison matrix.

title: Compute MANGO tree scores across multiple cases — MANGO_COMPARE
code: MANGO_COMPARE(   input_TERMLISTING,   filepath,   fileTABLE_path,   DEG_list_name,   GOTABLE_path,   outputPATH )

title: Compute MANGO tree scores across multiple cases — MANGO_COMPARE
text: input_TERMLISTING Path tree/subtree table produced term listing. filepath Base directory containing DEG_list_name. fileTABLE_path Path table listing MANGO preprocessing files (one per row). DEG_list_name DEG list filename filepath. GOTABLE_path Path GO list table written preprocessing. outputPATH Output path write comparison table.

title: Compute MANGO tree scores across multiple cases — MANGO_COMPARE
text: Writes outputPATH. Returns NULL invisibly.

title: Compute MANGO tree scores across multiple cases — MANGO_COMPARE
code: stopifnot(is.function(MANGO_COMPARE))

what: Compute MANGO tree scores for a single case — MANGO_COMPARE_SINGLE
title: Compute MANGO tree scores for a single case — MANGO_COMPARE_SINGLE
text: Single-condition version MANGO_COMPARE. Produces one-column comparison table single case.

title: Compute MANGO tree scores for a single case — MANGO_COMPARE_SINGLE
code: MANGO_COMPARE_SINGLE(   input_TERMLISTING,   filepath,   fileTABLE_path,   DEG_list_name,   GOTABLE_path,   PASSED_NUM,   outputPATH )

title: Compute MANGO tree scores for a single case — MANGO_COMPARE_SINGLE
text: input_TERMLISTING Path tree/subtree table produced term listing. filepath Base directory containing DEG_list_name. fileTABLE_path Path table listing single MANGO preprocessing file. DEG_list_name DEG list filename filepath. GOTABLE_path Path GO list table written preprocessing. PASSED_NUM Threshold passed dependency count (column 3). outputPATH Output path write comparison table.

title: Compute MANGO tree scores for a single case — MANGO_COMPARE_SINGLE
text: Writes outputPATH. Returns NULL invisibly.

title: Compute MANGO tree scores for a single case — MANGO_COMPARE_SINGLE
code: stopifnot(is.function(MANGO_COMPARE_SINGLE))

what: Draw a heatmap of MANGO results — MANGO_HeatMap
title: Draw a heatmap of MANGO results — MANGO_HeatMap
text: Create heatmap MANGO output tables (MANGO_SEPERATE MANGO_SEPERATE_forMULTI_range).

title: Draw a heatmap of MANGO results — MANGO_HeatMap
code: MANGO_HeatMap(   filepath,   DEG_list_name,   trends,   condition = "ALL",   width,   height,   max,   dynamic_analyisis = "F" )

title: Draw a heatmap of MANGO results — MANGO_HeatMap
text: filepath Working directory path. DEG_list_name DEG list filename filepath. trends One "", "", "SIG" (controls color palette). condition "", "SIG", specific condition index/value used last column MANGO_SEPERATE output. width Plot width (notebook display options). height Plot height (notebook display options). max Maximum value heatmap color scale (used breaks). dynamic_analyisis "F" single/multi heatmap using MANGO_SEPERATE, "T" dynamic analysis heatmap using MANGO_SEPERATE_forMULTI_range.

title: Draw a heatmap of MANGO results — MANGO_HeatMap
text: pheatmap object.

title: Draw a heatmap of MANGO results — MANGO_HeatMap
code: stopifnot(is.function(MANGO_HeatMap)) # \donttest{ # MANGO_HeatMap( #   filepath = ".", #   DEG_list_name = "input_DEG_list.txt", #   trends = "UP", #   condition = "ALL", #   width = 10, #   height = 6, #   max = 5, #   dynamic_analyisis = "F" # ) # }

what: Run GO enrichment preprocessing for MANGO — MANGO_PREPROCESSING
title: Run GO enrichment preprocessing for MANGO — MANGO_PREPROCESSING
text: Reads DEG lists, runs clusterProfiler::enrichGO (BP), writes per-case GO tables, calls preprocessing shell script writes resulting preprocessing list.

title: Run GO enrichment preprocessing for MANGO — MANGO_PREPROCESSING
code: MANGO_PREPROCESSING(   DEG_list_path,   GO_list_path,   MANGO_PREPROCESSING_list_path,   ref_genome,   core,   filepath )

title: Run GO enrichment preprocessing for MANGO — MANGO_PREPROCESSING
text: DEG_list_path Path table listing DEG files (one file per row). GO_list_path Output path write list generated GO result files. MANGO_PREPROCESSING_list_path Output path write list generated MANGO preprocessing result files. ref_genome Reference genome code. Use "mm" mouse "hs" human. core Number cores pass preprocessing shell script. filepath Base directory CODE/init_MANGO_PREPROCESSING.sh exists.

title: Run GO enrichment preprocessing for MANGO — MANGO_PREPROCESSING
text: Writes output files disk. Returns NULL invisibly.

title: Run GO enrichment preprocessing for MANGO — MANGO_PREPROCESSING
code: stopifnot(is.function(MANGO_PREPROCESSING)) if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ MANGO_PREPROCESSING(   DEG_list_path = "input_DEG_list.txt",   GO_list_path = "input_DEG_GO_list.txt",   MANGO_PREPROCESSING_list_path = "MANGO_PREPROCESSING_list.txt",   ref_genome = "mm",   core = 1,   filepath = "." ) } # }

what: Separate MANGO terms by condition specificity (with PASS/FAIL filtering) — MANGO_SEPERATE
title: Separate MANGO terms by condition specificity (with PASS/FAIL filtering) — MANGO_SEPERATE
text: function separates MANGO terms condition using comparison matrix, applies additional filtering based number matched GO terms per tree (>= PASSED_NUM) condition non-separated terms.

title: Separate MANGO terms by condition specificity (with PASS/FAIL filtering) — MANGO_SEPERATE
code: MANGO_SEPERATE(   input_COMPARE,   fileTABLE_path,   GOTABLE_path,   FC,   PASSED_NUM,   outputPATH )

title: Separate MANGO terms by condition specificity (with PASS/FAIL filtering) — MANGO_SEPERATE
text: input_COMPARE Path MANGO_COMPARE output file. fileTABLE_path Path MANGO_PREPROCESSING_list file (condition table). GOTABLE_path Path GO result list table (GO_list_path). FC Fold-change ratio cutoff used separating condition-specific terms. PASSED_NUM Minimum number matched GO terms required keep tree. outputPATH Output path write separated table.

title: Separate MANGO terms by condition specificity (with PASS/FAIL filtering) — MANGO_SEPERATE
text: Writes tab-delimited file outputPATH. Returns NULL invisibly.

title: Separate MANGO terms by condition specificity (with PASS/FAIL filtering) — MANGO_SEPERATE
code: stopifnot(is.function(MANGO_SEPERATE)) # \donttest{ # MANGO_SEPERATE( #   input_COMPARE = "MANGO_COMPARE.txt", #   fileTABLE_path = "MANGO_PREPROCESSING_list.txt", #   GOTABLE_path = "input_DEG_GO_list.txt", #   FC = 2, #   PASSED_NUM = 4, #   outputPATH = "MANGO_SEPERATE.txt" # ) # }

what: Differential-activity (DA) tree filtering for selected conditions — MANGO_SEPERATE_forDA
title: Differential-activity (DA) tree filtering for selected conditions — MANGO_SEPERATE_forDA
text: Given MANGO_COMPARE table across multiple conditions, function selects trees active specified condition indices satisfy fold-change separation criterion versus remaining conditions.

title: Differential-activity (DA) tree filtering for selected conditions — MANGO_SEPERATE_forDA
code: MANGO_SEPERATE_forDA(input_COMPARE, fileTABLE_path, FC, outputPATH, condition)

title: Differential-activity (DA) tree filtering for selected conditions — MANGO_SEPERATE_forDA
text: input_COMPARE Path MANGO_COMPARE result file (tab-delimited). fileTABLE_path Path MANGO_PREPROCESSING_list file (tab-delimited). FC Fold-change threshold DA criterion. outputPATH Output file path write DA-filtered result (tab-delimited). condition Integer vector 1-based condition indices define POS set.

title: Differential-activity (DA) tree filtering for selected conditions — MANGO_SEPERATE_forDA
text: Writes table outputPATH. Returns NULL invisibly.

title: Differential-activity (DA) tree filtering for selected conditions — MANGO_SEPERATE_forDA
code: stopifnot(is.function(MANGO_SEPERATE_forDA)) # \donttest{ # MANGO_SEPERATE_forDA( #   input_COMPARE = "MANGO_COMPARE.txt", #   fileTABLE_path = "MANGO_PREPROCESSING_list.txt", #   filepath = ".", #   DEG_list_name = "input_DEG_list.txt", #   FC = 2, #   outputPATH = "MANGO_SEPERATE_forDA.txt", #   condition = c(1, 2) # ) # }

what: Select significant MANGO terms within a condition range — MANGO_SEPERATE_forMULTI_range
title: Select significant MANGO terms within a condition range — MANGO_SEPERATE_forMULTI_range
text: Filters MANGO comparison results terms present selected conditions (condition_A:condition_B) exceeding FC ratio remaining conditions.

title: Select significant MANGO terms within a condition range — MANGO_SEPERATE_forMULTI_range
code: MANGO_SEPERATE_forMULTI_range(   input_COMPARE,   fileTABLE_path,   FC,   outputPATH,   condition_A,   condition_B )

title: Select significant MANGO terms within a condition range — MANGO_SEPERATE_forMULTI_range
text: input_COMPARE Path MANGO comparison table. fileTABLE_path Path table listing conditions (used determine number columns). FC Fold-change ratio cutoff used filtering. outputPATH Output path write filtered table. condition_A Start condition index (1-based, matching code convention). condition_B End condition index (1-based, matching code convention).

title: Select significant MANGO terms within a condition range — MANGO_SEPERATE_forMULTI_range
text: Writes outputPATH. Returns NULL invisibly.

title: Select significant MANGO terms within a condition range — MANGO_SEPERATE_forMULTI_range
code: stopifnot(is.function(MANGO_SEPERATE_forMULTI_range))

what: Build the MANGO term tree list across multiple cases — MANGO_TERMLISTING
title: Build the MANGO term tree list across multiple cases — MANGO_TERMLISTING
text: Aggregates total_Dependency strings across preprocessing outputs, computes pairwise overlap ratio, creates tree/subtree mapping based similarity threshold.

title: Build the MANGO term tree list across multiple cases — MANGO_TERMLISTING
code: MANGO_TERMLISTING(   PASSED_RATIO,   PASSED_NUM,   similarity,   fileTABLE_path,   outputPATH )

title: Build the MANGO term tree list across multiple cases — MANGO_TERMLISTING
text: PASSED_RATIO Threshold Ratio_of_passed_Dependency (column 4). PASSED_NUM Threshold passed dependency count (column 3). similarity Similarity cutoff (%) used define similar trees. fileTABLE_path Path table listing MANGO preprocessing files (one per row). outputPATH Output path write final tree/subtree table.

title: Build the MANGO term tree list across multiple cases — MANGO_TERMLISTING
text: Writes outputPATH. Returns NULL invisibly.

title: Build the MANGO term tree list across multiple cases — MANGO_TERMLISTING
code: stopifnot(is.function(MANGO_TERMLISTING))

what: Plot MANGO terms for a single tree (bar or chord) — MANGO_TERM_PLOT_forSINGLE
title: Plot MANGO terms for a single tree (bar or chord) — MANGO_TERM_PLOT_forSINGLE
text: Generate bar plot (term scores) chord diagram (term–gene links) selected tree MANGO single-case outputs.

title: Plot MANGO terms for a single tree (bar or chord) — MANGO_TERM_PLOT_forSINGLE
code: MANGO_TERM_PLOT_forSINGLE(   filepath,   DEG_list_name,   plot,   trends,   clusternum,   width,   height,   LABEL = "text for result",   lfc_leng = 2 )

title: Plot MANGO terms for a single tree (bar or chord) — MANGO_TERM_PLOT_forSINGLE
text: filepath Working directory path. DEG_list_name DEG list filename filepath. plot Plot type: "bar" "cir". trends One "", "", "SIG". clusternum Tree (cluster) index plot. width Plot width (notebook display options). height Plot height (notebook display options). LABEL Title label plot. lfc_leng Max abs LFC used chord color scaling.

title: Plot MANGO terms for a single tree (bar or chord) — MANGO_TERM_PLOT_forSINGLE
text: plot="bar", returns ggplot object (prints ). plot="cir", returns NULL invisibly (circos draws device).

what: MANGO multi-case term bar plot (term-level) — MANGO_TERM_barPLOT_forMULTI
title: MANGO multi-case term bar plot (term-level) — MANGO_TERM_barPLOT_forMULTI
text: Draw bar plot GO terms within selected MANGO tree multi-case results. function supports three modes via status: "common", "specific", "DA". Bars represent term score (tscore-like), dashed segments/points encode gene distribution ratio median fold-change genes term (implemented original logic).

title: MANGO multi-case term bar plot (term-level) — MANGO_TERM_barPLOT_forMULTI
code: MANGO_TERM_barPLOT_forMULTI(   filepath,   DEG_list_name,   status,   trends,   LABEL,   condition,   clusternum,   width,   height )

title: MANGO multi-case term bar plot (term-level) — MANGO_TERM_barPLOT_forMULTI
text: filepath Directory path containing input files. DEG_list_name DEG list table filename filepath. status One "common", "specific", "DA". trends One "", "", "SIG". LABEL Character vector case labels (used titles). condition Condition index (used pick case/contrast). clusternum Tree(cluster) index display. width Plot width (used repr.plot.width option notebooks). height Plot height (used repr.plot.height option notebooks).

title: MANGO multi-case term bar plot (term-level) — MANGO_TERM_barPLOT_forMULTI
text: ggplot object.

title: Plot MANGO trees for a single condition — MANGO_TREE_PLOT_forSINGLE

title: Plot MANGO trees for a single condition — MANGO_TREE_PLOT_forSINGLE
code: MANGO_TREE_PLOT_forSINGLE(filepath, trends, width, height, plot, DEG_list_name)

title: Plot MANGO trees for a single condition — MANGO_TREE_PLOT_forSINGLE
text: filepath Working directory path. trends One "", "", "SIG" (controls color palette). width Plot width (notebook display options). height Plot height (notebook display options). plot Plot type: "bar" "cir". DEG_list_name DEG list filename filepath.

title: Plot MANGO trees for a single condition — MANGO_TREE_PLOT_forSINGLE
text: ggplot object.

title: MANGO multi-case circular plot (tree-level) — MANGO_TREE_cirPLOT_forMULTI
code: MANGO_TREE_cirPLOT_forMULTI(   filepath,   DEG_list_name,   status,   trends,   LABEL,   project = "plot\nname",   condition = 1,   tree_size,   label_size,   project_size,   width,   height )

title: MANGO multi-case circular plot (tree-level) — MANGO_TREE_cirPLOT_forMULTI
text: filepath Directory path containing input files. DEG_list_name DEG list table filename filepath. status One "common", "specific", "DA". trends One "", "", "SIG". LABEL Character vector case labels. project Project label shown plot. condition Condition index (used "specific"). tree_size Text size tree labels. label_size Text size individual labels. project_size Text size project label. width Plot width (used repr.plot.width option notebooks). height Plot height (used repr.plot.height option notebooks).

title: MANGO multi-case circular plot (tree-level) — MANGO_TREE_cirPLOT_forMULTI
text: ggplot object.
